subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — and good to reconnect after the conference!

A 30-minute call next week sounds like a great idea. Please go ahead and suggest a few time slots that work for you and I'll confirm whichever fits best on our end.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share personal contact information for colleagues directly. If the conversation progresses and a senior technical touchpoint makes sense, we'll be happy to facilitate an introduction through the proper channels at that stage.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
